English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Ithaca Garden Club records
Ithaca Garden Club
6881
9 cubic feet. 9 cubic feet.
1943-2010. Correspondence, Manuscripts, Newspapers, Printed Materials, Scrapbooks Yearbooks, scrapbooks, albums containing clippings and programs from events, executive board files, and civic development project folders from the Ithaca Garden Club. Collection material in English 6850727
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
April 2010
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, April 2010
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
Founded in 1922, the Ithaca Garden Club is a longstanding member of the City Federation of Women's Organizations (CFWO) in Ithaca, NY.
Cite As:
Ithaca Garden Club records, #6881. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Scope and content
Yearbooks, scrapbooks, and albums containing clippings and programs from events, executive board files, annual reports, presidents' reports, and civic development project folders from the Ithaca Garden Club. Also, biographical sketches of Katharine Ziegler Heasley, Leona "Westy" Gelder, Jane E. Hardy, and Cele Kemple, various club histories, and Beatrice Szekely's civic development chronology with commentary.
Gardening.
